name: e31-assignment3
description: ## Overview This assignment is designed to give you practice with Express routing and templates. You'll create a small Express app that serves dynamic content based on URL parameters, and which uses a template engine to render HTML pages. The focus is on understanding how to define routes, handle parameters, and render views with a template engine. The result will be a simple web application that displays information, accepts new information via an HTML FORM, and which is deployed to the web for others to access.
